title: pinus latteri subsp. tonkinensis
intro: Pinus latteri subsp. tonkinensis, also known as Tonkin pine or Tonkin fir, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to Vietnam and China. This tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pinus latteri subsp. tonkinensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional Chinese and Vietnamese medicine.
